title: malva ludwigii
intro: Malva ludwigii, also known as marshmallow plant or althea, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, which are attributed to its high mucilage content. The health benefits of Malva ludwigii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing. Malva ludwigii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to benefit from its medicinal properties.
